Name: M 74 - Approving The City Fiscal Year 2027 Community Development Program, Reallocation of Fifty-Second Year Community Development Funds, and the Proposed Fifty-Third Year Community Development Program.
Title: Resolution approving The City Fiscal Year 2027 Community Development Program, Reallocation of Fifty-Second Year Community Development Funds, and the Proposed Fifty-Third Year Community Development Program

History.Description: This Resolution was Introduced by Council

History.Action: Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
History.Description: This Resolution was Hearing on P-C Item by Comm
A motion was made that this Resolution be P-C Item Approved by Comm approved by Roll Call.

Attachments.Name: Proposed City FY'27 Community Development Program

Text:
Whereas, The Office of Management and Budget has prepared a Proposed City Fiscal Year 2027 Community Development Program, a Proposed Reallocation of Fifty-Second Year Community Development Funds, and a Proposed Fifty-Third Year Community Development Program; and

      Whereas, The Proposed City Fiscal Year 2027 Community Development Program, Proposed Reallocation of Fifty-Second Year Community Development Funds, and Proposed Fifty-Third Year Community Development Program are provided to the City Council for review and consideration; and

      Resolved, That the Council of the City of New York hereby agrees to the Proposed Community Development Program for City Fiscal Year 2027 in the amount of $241,587,000, which reflects an increase of $375,000 from the Executive Budget as submitted by the Mayor on May 12, 2026; and be it further

      Resolved, That the Council of the City of New York hereby agrees to the Proposed Reallocation  of  Fifty-Second  Year  Community  Development  Funds  in  the  amount  of
$240,372,000, which reflects an increase of $188,000 from the Proposed Fifty-Second Year Community Development Budget as submitted by the Mayor on May 12, 2026; and be it further

      Resolved, That the Council of the City of New York hereby agrees to the Proposed Fifty-Third Year Community Development Program in the amount of $241,212,000 as submitted by the Mayor on May 12, 2026; and be it further

      Resolved, That the Council of the City of New York hereby shall have the opportunity to review the allocation as part of the City Fiscal Year 2028 budget adoption, of that portion of the Fifty-Third Community Development budget that will be scheduled to be spent in City Fiscal Year 2028 and not City Fiscal Year 2027.
